precision.note: T4 GPU: fp16 only. Switch to bf16 on A100/4090.

rationale.orpo_vs_dpo: ORPO chosen over DPO because it requires no reference model, reducing GPU memory footprint by ~40% on T4. Reference-free approach is appropriate for a judge component where the reference policy is undefined.
rationale.backbone_choice: Qwen2.5-1.5B-Instruct selected per Prometheus-2 paper (Kim et al., 2024) showing 7B-class judge viability at 1.5B with preference tuning.
rationale.lora_rank: Rank 16 with alpha 32 (2:1 ratio) is standard for task-specific adaptation. Rank 8 was considered but judge rubric complexity warrants higher rank.
rationale.beta_orpo: Beta=0.1 follows ORPO paper (Hong et al., 2024) recommendation for instruction-following tasks.
